evidence.locator: OCR Delivery Guide, printed page 5; Meena wants to fit in
evidence.approvedExcerpt: Feeling like an outsider and desperate to fit in with the other youngsters in the community

evidence.locator: OCR Delivery Guide, printed page 5; Sam and his gang
evidence.approvedExcerpt: Meena encounters racial prejudice by many characters, most notably from tearaway Sam Lowbridge and his gang

evidence.locator: OCR Delivery Guide, printed page 5; Nanima visits
evidence.approvedExcerpt: Nanima, who helps Meena understand her heritage and the reasons her parents came to England

evidence.locator: OCR Delivery Guide, printed page 5; Meena at school
evidence.approvedExcerpt: At school, Meena must pass the Eleven Plus so that she can attend grammar school.

evidence.locator: OCR Delivery Guide, printed page 5; motorway tensions
evidence.approvedExcerpt: Sam shouts a racist slogan into a local news camera.

evidence.locator: OCR Delivery Guide, printed page 5; attack after the broadcast
evidence.approvedExcerpt: The next day, the Indian man is attacked and robbed.

sources.rightsBasis: Wikipedia text is licensed under CC BY-SA 4.0; short attributed secondary-source plot excerpts are retained with source attribution and share-alike notice.

evidence.approvedExcerpt: The students' best pieces are collected by Madame for a mysterious gallery.

evidence.locator: Wikipedia plot synopsis; Ruth and Tommy
evidence.approvedExcerpt: As the students grow older, Tommy and Ruth start dating.

evidence.locator: Wikipedia plot synopsis; Miss Lucy reveals their purpose
evidence.approvedExcerpt: they have been created to donate their vital organs to others upon reaching adulthood

evidence.locator: Wikipedia plot synopsis; the students leave Hailsham
evidence.approvedExcerpt: When the students are 16, they move to the Cottages, a halfway house

evidence.locator: Wikipedia plot synopsis; after Ruth completes
evidence.approvedExcerpt: After Ruth completes, Kathy becomes Tommy's carer and they finally become a couple.

evidence.locator: Wikipedia plot synopsis; Miss Emily rejects the deferral rumour
evidence.approvedExcerpt: Miss Emily says that rumours of deferral were false
